label: critical-leakage-frontier
headline_statement: Conjecture 1 is confirmed: under Assumptions~\ref{ass:finite-var}--\ref{ass:regular-frontier}, the equality \(h_{\mathrm{LP}}(w;P)=h_\eta(w;P)\) holds exactly for \(\eta\ge\eta_w^*(P)\), and the critical radius is positive and finite on a nonempty open semi-algebraic class.
